content: 看完全界域了，省流就是全部都提升了不少的数值（加的有没有用先别管你就说有没有加吧），一些最终法则砍半数值下放到本体，降低了12+的必要性和性价比

4x~6x strength scaling per exalt with Thais is too broken yk?
Doresein would be immediately lose in terms of scaling after an exalt or two, not to mention that he's actually viable with OE, he would be nuts with ≈25x strength scaling on turn 2 (assuming you're using Winkle and Thais) which usually takes 6 turns with his current scaling rn..
Basically you're asking for a +100%~200% buff.. on top of the final damage he gets..
Other strength scalers usually have 3~6x strength damage at most btw

In what world are you feeding 2 Scions per turn to Uvhash devour while also filling his meter twice along with Winkle's?

Also where is 3-6x coming from? That's literally nothing unless youre talking about on one card that gets played multiple times on burst turn. Mouchette can easily get 20x+ across her cards and pursuits in addition to the flat damage boost from exalt
因为150狂气要求吧，感觉还算能接受
50-60x for mouchette even, because the final damage multiplier from her rouse applies to str as well

When the argument is that uvhash would outscale doresain after some dedicated resources, then I don't really see the problem, doresain isn't exactly any powerhouse lately, buffs to both would be appreciated

Base damage buffs are the least future proof thing they can buff for str scalers.... its not even considerate,

like, theres no way base damage buffs save them unless they really are sizeable, but even then, is that the right call? when numbers inflate, base dmg on str scalers ends up being absolutely terrible
